name: AdobeSignConnector
description: Connects to the Adobe Acrobat Sign REST v6 API. Creates, sends, reminds, cancels, and downloads e-signature agreements; manages library templates, users, workflows, and webhook subscriptions. Auto-discovers the caller's shard (na1, eu1, jp1, etc.) via /baseUris after OAuth code exchange.

install_fields.label: Adobe Sign Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Adobe Sign OAuth client ID
install_fields.help: From Adobe Developer Console → Adobe Sign integration → Client ID. Required for OAuth code exchange.

install_fields.label: Adobe Sign Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Adobe Sign OAuth client secret
install_fields.help: From Adobe Developer Console → Adobe Sign integration → Client Secret. Never logged. Required for OAuth code exchange.

install_fields.label: OAuth Host
install_fields.help: Adobe Sign OAuth host. Most accounts use the NA1 host even when their data lives on EU1 / JP1 / etc. — the per-shard API origin is discovered automatically after token exchange via /baseUris.

install_fields.label: OAuth Scopes
install_fields.default: user_read user_write agreement_read agreement_write agreement_send library_read library_write workflow_read
install_fields.help: Adobe Sign OAuth scopes. The integration in Developer Console must be configured with at least the same scopes — Adobe rejects any scope not registered there.

install_fields.label: Request timeout (seconds)
install_fields.help: Per-request httpx timeout for Adobe Sign API calls. Default 60s.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id and client_secret and stores config. Does NOT call Adobe Sign.

apis.name: OAuth Authorize
apis.description: Exchanges the OAuth authorization code for tokens, then calls /baseUris to discover the home shard and pivots the API base URL.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: GET /users/me — verifies API connectivity and token validity.

apis.name: Get Base URIs
apis.description: GET /baseUris — shard discovery. Returns apiAccessPoint + webAccessPoint for the caller's home Adobe Sign data centre.

apis.name: Create Agreement
apis.description: POST /agreements — create a new agreement (and optionally send it).

apis.name: List Agreements
apis.description: GET /agreements — cursor-paginated list of agreements visible to the calling user.

apis.name: Download Agreement
apis.description: GET /agreements/{agreementId}/combinedDocument — returns the signed PDF as bytes.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: GET /users — list users in the account.

apis.name: Create Webhook
apis.description: POST /webhooks — create a new webhook subscription.
